title: Modern Fullbright
description: Modern fullbright, no more dark! See everything with light in any server!
body: Modern Full Bright **4.0** is a lightweight client-side mod to say goodbye to the dark! Work on ANY server, just with a simple key press, you can toggle fullbright. Settings will remains! ## Key features: - Instantly enable or disable full bright by pressing B (default key but you can edit it). - When Fullbright is enabled, a configurable RGB text indicator appears at the top-right. (see screenshot). ### Screenshots - **You can disable the rgb indicator with "N" by default. (configurable)** ![Fullbright indicator 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3138e34437c64c58f72b6731a6f42cb7b046bf78.png) ![Fullbright indicator 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4174de18d2d0a0ac1fb2586d71d8fbc16a030ccd.png) ----------------- ![Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46e970f7ee4273f3bf2aabe3519a436369c420c5_0.webp) ----------------- ![Settings 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cf83d4b3c24cdc8265b242c6b363c38d40fdd55.png) ![Settings 2 rgb indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97f6e0ce3405fbffeefaa9fd2e1609692155a134.png) ----------------- Adding this mod in a modpack is highly appreciated, thanks! Please download version 4.0 and above. We advise you to upgrade it to 4.0
